notes.author: codex
notes.text: Verified end-to-end in throwaway pm workspace: build clean, tsc --noEmit clean, 2/2 tests pass. extension doctor: active 1, runtime_active 1, 0 failures. pm gantt (default) backward-compatible; --group-by assignee, --critical-path (marks A->B->C->E 4-item chain, excludes shorter A->D branch), --from all work. pm gantt export --format mermaid|html|ascii verified well-formed. Bad --format/--from exit 2 (USAGE), no double-invocation. SDK: registerCommand with flags REQUIRES 'schema' capability in manifest or activation throws; kept schema, dropped unused renderers.

notes.author: codex
notes.text:
2026-05-29 functional readiness audit evidence.

Package checks from /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-gantt-chart:
- `npm run check`: exit 0, 6s.
- `npm test`: exit 0, 14s; TAP reported `# tests 2`, `# pass 2`, `# fail 0`.
- `npm run pack:dry-run`: exit 0, 10s; tarball `pm-gantt-chart-2026.5.29.tgz`, package size 11.4 kB, unpacked size 39.5 kB, total files 9.
- `npm run changelog:check`: exit 0, 2s; `Changelog is up to date: /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-gantt-chart/CHANGELOG.md`.

Hands-on test used temporary workspace `/tmp/pm-core-audit-20260529/workspaces/pm-gantt-chart.*` with local install `pm install /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-gantt-chart`.
- Created three scheduled items with deadlines 2026-06-05, 2026-06-12, and 2026-06-19 across sprint/release groupings.
- `pm --json gantt --weeks 6 --group-by milestone`: exit 0; returned `itemCount: 3`, `groupCount: 2`, chart included `Q2 Migration`, `Retail Pilot`, and truncated item labels.
- `pm --json gantt --weeks 6 --group-by tag --status in_progress`: exit 0; returned `itemCount: 1`, `groupCount: 1`.
- Corrected verification using the renderer's displayed truncated label `Finish supplier API migr`: exit 0. An earlier full-title assertion failed because the renderer truncates item labels, not because the command failed.

Sensitive-data scan:
- Current tracked files and git history scanned without printing matching values using pattern classes `private_key`, `provider_token`, `secret_assignment`, and `email_address`.
- No matches found for pm-gantt-chart.

Blockers: none found for pm-gantt-chart.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. High-confidence worktree/history secret scan recorded no credential-shaped token findings for active package code; nonzero scan rows were classified as placeholders or vendored historical test data where applicable. Logs: /tmp/pm-active-package-gates-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-changelog-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-release-check-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-validate-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-secret-scan-20260529.tsv.
